summary: Role 1 final consensus review completed for docs/OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md after Role 8 and Role 9 revisions; plan sufficiency only was assessed, not implementation completion.
decisions: Role 8 Observatory/product evidence objections are integrated through P1-11 API/UI/negative/browser proof acceptance conditions.

Role 9 install/new-PC/release parity objections are integrated through P2-12 verifier commands, release proof artifact fields, degraded Git-missing fallback, and new verify:install-equivalence / verify:release-manifest requirements.
The plan correctly keeps Final Consensus Record pending until ten same-round AGREE verdicts are collected and does not claim implementation completion.
next_steps: Do not mark implementation complete until the hard gates and verifier commands are implemented and pass on the real vault.
